task_completion.description: Navigate to the ticket creation form in Vtiger CRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM interface is visible with the 'Create Ticket' or 'New Ticket' form open.
The Title input field contains exactly 'API gateway returning 503 errors under load'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct Organization and Contact Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Organization field shows 'Apex Dynamics Inc' and the Contact Name field shows 'Robert Chen'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Priority, Severity, and Status
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Priority dropdown shows 'High', the Severity dropdown shows 'Major', and the Status dropdown shows 'Open'.
The Description text area contains the text starting with 'Production API gateway (api.apexdynamics.com) returning HTTP 503 Service Unavailable errors...'.

task_completion.description: Save the ticket and view the created record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved ticket summary view or a success notification is visible, showing the newly created ticket with the specified title in the Vtiger CRM interface.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Vtiger CRM GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) is visible with the Vtiger CRM application loaded, rather than a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual CRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields, dropdowns, and text areas belong to the Vtiger CRM web interface, not a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The ticket was genuinely submitted and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show a read-only summary view of the created ticket or a confirmation message, proving the form was submitted and not just filled out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values in the created ticket: Title = 'API gateway returning 503 errors under load', Organization = 'Apex Dynamics Inc', Contact Name = 'Robert Chen', Priority = 'High', Severity = 'Major', Status = 'Open'. The description must mention 'api.apexdynamics.com', '503 Service Unavailable', 'v2.4.1', and 'connection pool exhaustion'.
